items.title: In Hotels Near Cities A Short Break!

items.text: The trip was absolutely amazing! The knowledge of destinations was impressive and made the journey doubly enjoyable. I'll definitely book again with Pathora.
Outstanding service from start to finish. The personalized attention and expertise were exceptional. I've never had such a seamless travel experience.
Pathora made our family vacation unforgettable. Every detail was perfectly planned and our guide was knowledgeable and friendly.

stats.description: Travel your way—discover new destinations, choose the tour that fits your style, and let Pathora handle the details from booking to documents and visa support.

cta.title: Keep things flexible
cta.description: Go ahead and take that trip — we know how important it is to travel on your schedule.

whyChoose.title: Why choose Tour
whyChoose.subtitle: We offer the best travel experience every time

features.title: Easy Relaxed & Transparent Pricing
features.desc: We provide transparent pricing with no hidden fees so you can travel worry-free.

features.title: Stress & Discounted Booking
features.desc: Book your tours at discounted prices with our easy and stress-free booking process.

features.title: Full Payment & Visa Support
features.desc: We handle all payment processing and provide full visa support for your journey.

features.title: Reliable Top Services
features.desc: Our experienced team ensures top-notch service throughout your entire travel experience.

aboutUs.heroSubtitle: Turning ordinary moments into extraordinary journeys since 2010. Every trip is a story — let us help you write yours.
aboutUs.whoWeAreDesc1: Pathora was born from a simple belief: travel should transform you. We started as two friends with backpacks and big dreams, and grew into a team of over 120 specialists spread across five continents.
aboutUs.whoWeAreDesc2: Today, we design meticulously crafted tours — from budget adventures to VIP luxury retreats — all united by our commitment to authentic, meaningful experiences.

values.globalExpertiseDesc: Our local partners in 80+ countries give you genuine, on-the-ground knowledge you can't get from a guidebook.
values.safeTrustedDesc: Every itinerary is rigorously vetted. Your safety and comfort are our first priority, always.
values.tailoredForYouDesc: From solo backpackers to luxury honeymoons, we craft every trip around your unique story.
values.seamlessExperienceDesc: Book, plan, and travel — all in one place. We handle the details so you can focus on the memories.

aboutUs.journeyTitle: From a Dream to the World

timeline.foundedDesc: Pathora started as a small passion project by two avid travelers who wanted to share the world.
timeline.first10kDesc: Reached our first milestone with curated tours across Southeast Asia and Europe.
timeline.expanded60Desc: Launched luxury and private tour lines, bringing tailored experiences to every continent.
timeline.digitalFirstDesc: Redesigned for the modern traveler — real-time booking, instant support, and personalized AI recommendations.
timeline.happy92kDesc: Over 92,000 adventures completed. Still counting — and still passionate about every single trip.

aboutUs.ctaDescription: Browse our curated packages, find the perfect tour for you, and let us handle every detail.

policies.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to know before booking — clear, fair, and no hidden surprises.
policies.policiesApplyNote: These policies apply to all tours booked through Pathora.
policies.introSuffix: , we believe in clear, honest communication. These policies are designed to protect both our travelers and our team. Please read them carefully before completing your booking. By booking with us, you agree to the terms outlined below.

items.bookingPaymentItem1: A non-refundable deposit of 20% is required to secure your booking.
items.bookingPaymentItem2: Full payment is due 30 days before the tour departure date.
items.bookingPaymentItem3: Payments accepted via bank transfer, credit/debit card, and major digital wallets.
items.bookingPaymentItem4: All prices are listed in USD and include applicable taxes unless stated otherwise.
items.cancellationRefundItem1: Cancellations made 30+ days before departure: full refund minus the deposit.
items.cancellationRefundItem2: Cancellations 15–29 days before departure: 50% refund of the total tour price.
items.cancellationRefundItem3: Cancellations within 14 days of departure: no refund.
items.cancellationRefundItem4: Pathora-initiated cancellations: full refund or free rebooking offered.
items.cancellationRefundItem5: Travel insurance is strongly recommended for all bookings.
items.modificationItem1: One free date change is allowed per booking if requested 21+ days before departure.
items.modificationItem2: Subsequent changes or changes made within 20 days will incur a $50 admin fee.
items.modificationItem3: Tour itinerary changes due to weather or safety are at Pathora's discretion.
items.modificationItem4: We will notify you of any significant changes at the earliest opportunity.
items.healthSafetyItem1: All travelers must disclose relevant health conditions at the time of booking.
items.healthSafetyItem2: Pathora reserves the right to exclude travelers who pose a safety risk.
items.healthSafetyItem3: Our guides are certified in first aid and emergency procedures.
items.healthSafetyItem4: Compliance with local health regulations is mandatory on all tours.
items.privacyPolicyItem1: We collect only the information necessary to process your booking.
items.privacyPolicyItem2: Personal data is never sold to or shared with third parties without consent.
items.privacyPolicyItem3: Payment details are encrypted and processed through PCI-compliant gateways.
items.privacyPolicyItem4: You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us.
items.liabilityItem1: Pathora acts as an intermediary between travelers and local service providers.
items.liabilityItem2: We are not liable for delays, losses, or damages caused by third-party providers.
items.liabilityItem3: Force majeure events (natural disasters, political unrest, etc.) are exempt from liability.
items.liabilityItem4: All travelers participate in adventure activities at their own risk.

policies.ctaDescription: Our support team is available 24/7. Don't hesitate to reach out before or after your booking.
